_doc: Synthetic fixtures for export-pdf-wrongthread-session0. Save Document as PDF faults with InvalidCastException / RPC_E_WRONG_THREAD (0x8001010E) because the job runs unattended in Session 0 (non-interactive), where Word interop has no interactive STA to own the document. No external Word is involved; the run surface is the cause. The workflow is structurally correct.

rules._doc: Proxy open-ended docsai queries to the real uip CLI; cache results in _cache/.
